conversation_text: There is something definitely wrong with the hot water supply ever since the last shutoff.  In the kitchen to get hot water I have to run the hot water for about 10 minutes before any hot water flows, but as soon as I turn the hot water off and then back on again, it is back to cold.  In the bathroom, I have to run both the bathtub and the sink at the same time for about 10 minutes to get the hot water to run.  This is an EXTREME waste of water and a great inconvenience.  Please have this looked into.  Also, since the last shutoff, when the water does finally get hot, it doesn't get as hot as it did prior to the shutoff.

split_issues_expected.issue_text: Hot water does not get as hot as it did before the shutoff.
Hot water takes too long to reach the kitchen and bathroom.
